calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Hearing On Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structed Settlement Payment Rights
Off Calendar May-05-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Gary A. Cerio, Esq. of Keller Sloan Roman & Holland, Tel. 415.249.8330, for petitioner and moving party;
Dina S. Van Meter, payee, appearing on her own behalf.

RULING: The matter was discussed. Miss Van Meter was examined by the Court. For good cause shown, PETITIONER FIRST PROVIDEN, LLC'S Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights by Dina S. Van Meter is granted. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: A. James Robertson, II; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR# 5976.
